# ЛЕВЕЛ 8 (Level 8)

> Bulgarian digital agency based in Varna, specializing in e-commerce, AI chatbots, business automation, and website maintenance. We build custom digital solutions for businesses across Bulgaria and the EU.

- Website: https://level8.bg
- Email: contact@level8.bg
- Phone: +359 895 552 550
- Location: Varna, Bulgaria
- EIK: 208697165

## Services

- [E-commerce Websites](https://level8.bg/#services): Custom Next.js and Shopify online stores with payment integration, inventory management, and conversion optimization
- [AI Chatbots](https://level8.bg/#services): Intelligent customer service bots trained on your business data with natural language understanding
- [Business Automation](https://level8.bg/#services): Workflow automation, CRM integration, reporting dashboards, and process optimization
- [Loyalty Programs](https://level8.bg/#services): Customer retention systems with points, rewards, gamification, and engagement tracking
- [Website Maintenance](https://level8.bg/#pricing): 24/7 monitoring, bug fixes, performance optimization, SLA-backed support plans from 200-450 EUR/month

## Case Studies

- [Euphoria Beauty](https://level8.bg/projects/euphoria-beauty): Beauty salon website with online booking system — +180% increase in reservations
- [Vrachka.eu](https://level8.bg/projects/vrachka): AI-powered astrology platform — 2000+ active users
- [Bacho Iliya](https://level8.bg/projects/bacho-iliya): Landing page for premium dairy products — 3x increase in inquiries
- [Profiline GM25](https://level8.bg/projects/profiline): Product showcase website — achieved Top 3 Google organic ranking
- [Ivanovi-AM](https://level8.bg/projects/ivanovi-am): Corporate website for Mitsubishi Electric dealer — +45% organic traffic growth
- [Your Moment](https://level8.bg/projects/your-moment): Wedding photography portfolio — +60% inquiry increase
- [Exotic Flowers](https://level8.bg/projects/exotic-flowers): Garden center with online catalog and ordering system

## Blog

- [Blog](https://level8.bg/blog): Articles on AI trends, digital marketing, SEO, e-commerce, and technology tools in Bulgarian
- [RSS Feed](https://level8.bg/blog/rss.xml): Latest 20 published articles
